creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Vikash Badal from comment #2)
There is an issue in the build system of a vault, which is it does not build the vault-ui as it requires gazillions of dependencies like npm and yarn. So what we do is we prebuild it and share it as a distfile. You will see that there is a file from LOCAL/bofh which is the one we have to prepare first. So there are number of steps involved for this port and rather than submitting a patch for this specific port it is always better just to send me a mail or reminder. As even though someone prepares the dist file we will not accept it and regenerate it by ourselves. And then upload and then update the ports.
